description:
Refused parent-framed (A) BFZ-54 + BFZ-55 cohort attach per model-dispatch-note rule: parent itself flagged the move as 'Sonnet-override-shape work — parent knows the targets,' and running Opus on a verify-and-write move is wasted budget. Deferred (B) — explicitly aligned with parent's own framing ('wait for trivia to finish, then a bigger cluster operation becomes viable. Defer to next wave'). Took (C): an enlightened-corrective body-prose pass on the [[eldrazi]] node body's BFZ-block subtype-tier typology, which has two confab paragraphs that would have been inherited by the in-flight wave-201 Cryptic Cruiser trivia AND by the deferred-Sonnet (A) attach pass when either fires.

The confab: the [[eldrazi]] node body's 'What this node anchors' paragraph (line 56) and its 'Scale gradient as design signature' bullet (line 89) both claimed the brood-lineage tier structure is 'Titan → Drones → Scions → Spawn' as if all four were creature-card subtypes descending through the brood. Verified against Scryfall live API: only TWO creature-card subtypes exist beneath Titan tier — `t:drone` (71 cards across multiple sets) and `t:processor` (11 cards, BFZ-block almost exclusively). Spawn and Scion exist ONLY as token-only subtypes — `t:scion+t:eldrazi` returns 404 (zero creature cards), `is:token+t:eldrazi` returns the Spawn and Scion token-creature entries.

Also missing entirely from the node body: the BFZ-block design loop where Ingest-bearing Drone-tier creatures (e.g. Benthic Infiltrator BFZ-55) exile cards into a holding zone, and Processor-tier creatures (e.g. Cryptic Cruiser BFZ-56, Wasteland Strangler) consume that exile zone for their abilities. This Drone-Ingest → Processor-consumption feeding loop IS the BFZ-block design signature and was missing from the node's canonical-source-of-truth taxonomy.

Corrected in two paragraphs of cards/_characters/eldrazi.md: (1) 'What this node anchors' rewrote the tier-cascade to distinguish creature-card subtypes (Drone, Processor) from token-only subtypes (Scion, Spawn), with Scryfall live API citation counts for each tier and the canonical token-source attribution (Scion from BFZ 2015, Spawn from Rise of the Eldrazi 2010). (2) 'Scale gradient as design signature' bullet rewrote the gradient to reference the corrected typology, added the Drone-Ingest → Processor-consumption feeding loop with three in-corpus card cites (Benthic Infiltrator BFZ-55, Eldrazi Skyspawner BFZ-58, Cryptic Cruiser BFZ-56) plus the canonical out-of-corpus example (Wasteland Strangler).

This pass is enlightened-corrective (no edges added, no edges removed, body-prose typology corrected). The 'replacement' shape tag captures that false canonical typology is being replaced with verified Scryfall-API-grounded typology across two paragraphs of the cohort node. Same shape as wave-200's Coatl confab correction but on a different fact-class (BFZ-block subtype taxonomy vs creature-type-name claim).

Why this beats (A) and (B) for the Opus budget: (1) it has to be done BEFORE the in-flight wave-201 Cryptic Cruiser trivia lands so that trivia agent has correct typology to draw from (currently the typology-confab would cascade into the trivia body); (2) it has to be done BEFORE the deferred-Sonnet (A) attach pass writes Connections bullets for BFZ-54/55 (which would inherit the missing-Processor tier without Drone-Ingest-loop framing); (3) it requires full corpus-context-walking (Scryfall live API verification of four card type_lines + two cohort-typology queries + cross-reference against current node body) that is canonical Opus-shape work per the model dispatch note ('if the agent has to FIND the move, Opus'). The wave-200 sidecar surveyed cohorts and missed this typology gap because its focus was on Coatl/Wumpus subtype confab; the wave-201 in-flight trivia gave the parent reason to think about BFZ subtypes which surfaced the gap.
citations: [Scryfall live API: GET /cards/named?exact=Benthic+Infiltrator&set=bfz → type_line 'Creature — Eldrazi Drone', verified 2026-05-25]
[Scryfall live API: GET /cards/named?exact=Eldrazi+Skyspawner&set=bfz → type_line 'Creature — Eldrazi Drone', verified 2026-05-25]
[Scryfall live API: GET /cards/named?exact=Cryptic+Cruiser&set=bfz → type_line 'Creature — Eldrazi Processor', verified 2026-05-25]
[Scryfall live API: GET /cards/named?exact=Adverse+Conditions&set=bfz → type_line 'Instant' (Devoid, creates Eldrazi Scion token), verified 2026-05-25]
[Scryfall live API: GET /cards/search?q=t%3Adrone → total_cards 71 across multiple sets including 5DN/BFZ/OGW/ROE/MH3/M3C, verified 2026-05-25]
[Scryfall live API: GET /cards/search?q=t%3Aprocessor → total_cards 11, all BFZ-block except 1 (Void Attendant OTC reprint), verified 2026-05-25]
[Scryfall live API: GET /cards/search?q=t%3Ascion+t%3Aeldrazi → 404 not_found (zero creature cards with Eldrazi Scion type-line), verified 2026-05-25]
[Scryfall live API: GET /cards/search?q=t%3Aeldrazi+is%3Atoken → 6 token entries including Eldrazi Scion (TM3C) and Eldrazi Spawn (TSOC), verified 2026-05-25]

[In-corpus: cards/magic-the-gathering/battle-for-zendikar/55-benthic-infiltrator.md trivia bullet 4 cites 'Processor cards like Wasteland Strangler' — corpus implicitly already knows Processor exists]
[Potion rule sub-rule 2 — hub-attribution must survive a 'canonical citation?' question; same discipline applied to subtype-tier-typology citations]

edges_corrected.edge: Eldrazi cohort body — 'What this node anchors' paragraph (line 56)
edges_corrected.correction: Replaced 'three canonical tiers — Drones, Scions, and Spawn — each generation smaller and more numerous' with verified Scryfall-grounded typology: two creature-card subtypes (Drone with 71-card count, Processor with 11-card count and BFZ-block attribution) PLUS two token-only subtypes (Scion from BFZ 2015, Spawn from Rise of the Eldrazi 2010), with explicit note that no creature card carries a Scion or Spawn type-line. Final tier-cascade restated as 'Titan → Drone / Processor (creature cards) → Scion / Spawn (tokens).'

edges_corrected.edge: Eldrazi cohort body — 'Scale gradient as design signature' bullet (line 89)
edges_corrected.correction: Replaced 'Titan, Drone, Scion, Spawn — each smaller and more numerous than the last' with reference to the corrected typology in the body above. Added the Drone-Ingest → Processor-consumption feeding loop as the BFZ-block design signature, with three in-corpus card cites (Benthic Infiltrator BFZ-55 as Ingest-bearing Drone, Eldrazi Skyspawner BFZ-58 as Scion-generating Drone, Cryptic Cruiser BFZ-56 as exile-consuming Processor) plus canonical out-of-corpus example (Wasteland Strangler).

moves_refused_with_reason.move: (A) BFZ Adverse Conditions + Benthic Infiltrator cohort attaches to [[eldrazi]]
moves_refused_with_reason.reason: Parent itself flagged this as 'Sonnet-override-shape work — parent knows the targets' in both the wave-201 brief and the wave-200 sidecar's next_pass_suggestions. Per the model dispatch note ('if the agent has to FIND the move, Opus. If the agent has to VERIFY + WRITE a known move, Sonnet is fine'), running Opus on this is wasted budget. Deferred to next-wave Sonnet override, exactly as the brief structured it. Adding: the typology correction made this pass strengthens the substrate the Sonnet pass writes from — Connections bullets can now correctly identify each card as Drone-Ingest-tier (Benthic Infiltrator) vs Devoid-instant-creating-Scion-token (Adverse Conditions) with the Drone-Processor feeding loop available as the BFZ-block design framing.

moves_refused_with_reason.move: (B) Bundle the deferred (A) attaches with this wave's in-flight Cryptic Cruiser + Eldrazi Skyspawner trivia work into a 4-card cluster attach next wave
moves_refused_with_reason.reason: Parent already flagged this as 'Defer to next wave' in the brief — concurring. Cryptic Cruiser and Eldrazi Skyspawner both have empty `## Trivia` sections as of this read; the wave-201 trivia pass needs to complete first. The typology correction this pass strengthens the substrate that 4-card bundle will draw from when it fires; the bundle's Connections bullets can now correctly slot Benthic Infiltrator + Eldrazi Skyspawner as Drone tier, Cryptic Cruiser as Processor tier, and Adverse Conditions as a Devoid instant that creates a Scion token (the only token-tier-tier representative of the four).

moves_refused_with_reason.move: Parent-suggested follow-up — whether 'Eldrazi Drone subtype = Titan-instrument layer' earns its own body-prose paragraph
moves_refused_with_reason.reason: Considered, partially folded into the typology correction. The Drone-as-Titan-extended-limb framing is now in the corrected 'What this node anchors' paragraph ('with each Drone functioning as a Titan-extended limb rather than as an autonomous brood entity'). A separate dedicated paragraph would be additive rather than corrective, and per single-invocation discipline (one operation per call, prefer optimization over addition) the corrective work outranks the additive work this wave. If the deferred-Sonnet (A) attach + the bundled (B) 4-card cluster pass surface enough cards-per-Drone-corpus-density to warrant a dedicated paragraph, Edgelord-enlightened can add it as a separate pass. Currently 5 BFZ Drone-tier cards in corpus (Kozilek's Sentinel + Immobilizer Eldrazi already attached + Benthic Infiltrator + Eldrazi Skyspawner pending attach + Cryptic Cruiser is Processor-tier not Drone-tier) — adequate density for body-prose but not yet warranting its own paragraph until the BFZ cluster work completes.

other_candidates_considered: Mogg-fanatic-lineage symbol node still 2/4 corpus per wave-196 + wave-200 entries — no motion this wave, future-watch for Mogg Fanatic / Goblin Grenade / Mogg War Marshal entering corpus to trigger chain or symbol-tier promotion.

Snapping Voidcraw + Twisted Riddlekeeper + Hope-Ender Coatl + Wumpus Aberration Connections-bullet symmetric cross-referencing — still in next_pass from wave 200, still Sonnet-shape work, no change this wave.

M21 unwired backlog (96 cards) — the corpus's largest unwired set per `bbl_edgelord_queue.py --unwired --by-set`. Surveyed for cohort candidates that might cross threshold (e.g. Akroma's Cycle, Garruk's third printing, M21 Planeswalker cycle). Nothing crossed threshold for solo edge or node-proposal threshold this pass — most M21 unwired cards are isolated commons without clear sibling-pair material in current corpus. Future-watch: when an M21 enrichment wave completes (vision + trivia), the 96-card set becomes a rich Edgelord-territory because the M21 Core Set design brief had an explicit retro-tribal theme (Pridemalkin, Rambunctious Mutt per the Blackwell-register lair seed memory) that should surface cohort clusters once trivia lands.

Anax, Harden in the Forge (CMM-204) — surfaced via parent brief as wave-201 vision-in-flight. Pre-enrichment (tags_hub: [], no trivia). Skipped per standard Edgelord discipline — can't edge an un-enriched card.
FF9 Zidane party cluster — node exists, 4 cards attached (Vivi, Garnet, Freya, Artemicion). No motion needed this wave; the node is in a healthy growing state.

Refusal-with-receipts as the entire pass — considered. If the Cryptic Cruiser type-line had verified as 'Eldrazi Drone' (matching the parent's verbatim brief language of 'Cryptic Cruiser + Eldrazi Skyspawner will land Drone / Skyspawner type-line confirmations'), the only valid moves would have been (A) deferral, (B) deferral, or pure refusal. Instead, the Scryfall verification surfaced that Cryptic Cruiser is actually Processor-not-Drone, AND that the cohort node body had a subtype-typology confab that would have cascaded through the in-flight trivia work. Single-invocation budget correctly spent on the correction. Parent's brief itself contained the verbatim 'Drone / Skyspawner type-line confirmations' language — without verification, this typology error would have propagated into the wave-201 trivia, the deferred-Sonnet (A) attach, and the bundled (B) 4-card pass. Refusal of (A) and (B) plus C-side typology correction is the receipts-bearing alternative.
next_pass_suggestions: Sonnet-override triage (mode-2 narrow-scope, parent-shaped, deferred from wave 200 + 201): attach BFZ Adverse Conditions (BFZ-54) + Benthic Infiltrator (BFZ-55) + Cryptic Cruiser (BFZ-56) + Eldrazi Skyspawner (BFZ-58) to [[eldrazi]] cohort as a 4-card bundle once Cryptic Cruiser and Eldrazi Skyspawner trivia completes (currently in flight). Standard three-sided attach (frontmatter `characters:` block-form + card body `## Connections` bullet + node `appears_on:` + auto-gen `## Appears on` block). Connections bullets can now correctly slot Benthic Infiltrator + Eldrazi Skyspawner as Drone-tier (with Benthic-as-Ingest-source and Skyspawner-as-Scion-generator), Cryptic Cruiser as Processor-tier (closing the Ingest-loop with exile-consumption), Adverse Conditions as Devoid-instant-creating-Scion-token. Body roster counter would move from 16 → 20 with these four adds; the stale BFZ-coverage caveat at lines 140-141 also needs updating in that pass (currently says 'Eldrazi Skyspawner remains canonical Eldrazi anchor not yet in inventory' which is no longer true).

Sonnet-override triage (mode-2 narrow-scope, bundled with above): extend the Snapping Voidcraw + Twisted Riddlekeeper + Hope-Ender Coatl + Wumpus Aberration Connections bullets to symmetrically reference the four-card MH3 brood-corruption-of-existing-creature-subtypes mini-cohort, per the still-pending wave-200 next-pass entry. Mechanical wikilink-discipline work: each bullet cites the other three by name+type in backticks (NOT wikilinks — these are sibling-cohort within-node references, not separate-node edges, and the Potion sub-rule 5 backtick discipline applies).

Future-watch (carried forward, augmented): the BFZ-block design loop is now correctly documented in node body. When BFZ Eldrazi corpus expands beyond the current 4-pending-attach + 4-already-attached = 8 BFZ Eldrazi anchors, the Drone-Ingest → Processor-consumption design framing can carry a dedicated paragraph in 'The functional ideology' section if 3+ Processor-tier cards enter corpus (currently only Cryptic Cruiser is Processor-tier in BFZ corpus, threshold not met for dedicated paragraph). Per Potion sub-rule 4, this is body-prose-density-monitoring not graph-graduation — Processor-tier will NOT become its own symbol or sub-character node.
Future-watch (carried forward, unchanged): mogg-fanatic-lineage symbol node still 2/4 corpus. Goblin Arsonist + Mogg Mob. No motion this wave.
